name: Progress
description: A horizontal progress bar showing completion percentage.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Show an animated indeterminate (looping) fill instead of a determinate bar.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Display the percentage or custom `valueLabel` next to the bar.

props.name: valueLabel
props.description: Custom text displayed instead of the computed percentage when `showValue` is true.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme for the fill bar. When unset, defaults to blue (or auto-color thresholds).

props.name: striped
props.description: Apply a diagonal stripe pattern to the fill bar.

props.name: animated
props.description: Animate the stripe pattern. Requires `striped` to be true.

props.name: segments
props.description: Number of visual segments dividing the track. `0` disables segmentation.

props.name: autoColor
props.description: Automatically change fill color based on value thresholds (blue → yellow → red).

slots.name: label
slots.description: Text label rendered above the progress bar.
